calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-09-2002 Continued To Aug-12-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2002 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Michael Rossoff, Esq., and there being no appearance by defendant, the court orders the request for jury trial of defendants stricken. Trial date is, however; confirmed.
